error_signature: Loop node not processing XML loc info correctly
title: Loop node not processing XML data correctly
symptom: The Loop node is incorrectly using the output from the Google Sheet node as input for the next iteration instead of the expected XML filename.
not_this_if: The Loop node is configured correctly with the right inputs
root_cause: The Loop node's settings may be misconfigured, specifically the reset option and the number of iterations. If the reset option is enabled or the loop is set to run only once, it can lead to incorrect data being processed in subsequent iterations.
fix_steps: Ensure the reset option is disabled
Check that the loop is set to run for the correct number of iterations
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Disable the reset option in the Loop node settings and ensure it runs for the correct number of iterations.
